promptSent: Using the Azure DevOps tools, list all active (open) pull requests in the repository that have 'Moaid Hathot' as a reviewer. For each PR, return the following fields in a JSON array: id, title, createdBy (the author's display name), creationDate, sourceRefName, targetRefName, and the list of reviewer display names. Return ONLY the JSON array, no markdown fencing or explanation.
